# Node-API CTS skip list for Hermes
#
# Lines starting with '#' are comments.
# Blank lines are ignored.
# Each non-comment line is a test name (directory name under
# tests/js-native-api/) that should be skipped, optionally followed
# by a '#' comment explaining the reason.
#
# Example:
#   test_name  # reason for skipping
#
# Currently all CTS tests pass — no entries needed.
